summary: Completed comprehensive testing of multi-language system (PT/EN) and interactive demo page with guided tour. All core functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct auto-detected language (EN from browser)
Language selector dropdown shows PT and EN options correctly
Language switching functionality works perfectly (PT ↔ EN)
Start Guided Tour button displays and functions
Tour modal opens with welcome message and navigation works
View toggle between Customer and Admin Panel works
Customer view shows menu with 8 products and functional cart
Add to cart functionality works (cart updates with count)
Place Order functionality works (order placed, cart empties)
Admin Panel displays stats cards (Today's Orders, Revenue)
Admin Panel shows orders list with 4 demo order items
Navigation back to landing page works correctly
